name: Love's Travel Stop #833
description: Full-service truck stop at the PA state line (I-90 Exit 61) with about 73 truck parking spaces, 8 fuel lanes, 24-hour diesel/DEF, showers, laundry, a deli/fast food and a CAT Scale.

name: CAT Scale at Love's Ripley
description: Certified CAT Scale co-located at Love's Travel Stop #833 at I-90 Exit 61 near the PA line.

name: Kwik Fill #380 - Fredonia
description: 24-hour Kwik Fill fuel stop at I-90 Exit 59 (Dunkirk/Fredonia) with diesel, a C-store and propane; a fuel/convenience stop with limited to no overnight truck parking.

name: Angola Service Area
description: Rebuilt (2025) Applegreen-operated NY Thruway service plaza at milepost 447 serving both directions between Exit 57A (Eden-Angola) and Exit 58 (Silver Creek), with 24-hour high-speed diesel, truck/bus/RV parking, a food court and a C-store.

name: TA Pembroke #194
description: TravelCenters of America off the Thruway at I-90 Exit 48A / NY-77 with about 132 truck parking spaces, 8 fuel lanes, 6 showers, 6 truck service bays, 24/7 Mobil diesel, laundry and food.

name: Flying J Travel Center #693
description: Pilot Flying J travel center off I-90 Exit 48A with about 140 parking spaces, 7 fuel lanes, 9 showers, 24-hour diesel, Denny's, laundry, Wi-Fi and an RV dump station.

name: Pembroke Service Area (Eastbound)
description: Applegreen-operated NY Thruway eastbound service area (reopened 2023) at milepost 397 between Exit 48A (Pembroke) and Exit 48 (Batavia), one of the Thruway plazas with expanded commercial-driver amenities; 24-hour diesel, truck parking and Burger King/Popeyes/Dunkin.

name: 490 Truck Stop
description: Independent truck stop at I-90 Exit 47 (Le Roy / I-490 / NY-19) near Bergen with diesel fuel, truck parking, a restaurant and shower facilities.

name: Kwik Fill #85 - Cheektowaga
description: Kwik Fill fuel stop near I-90 Exit 52 (Buffalo/Cheektowaga) with diesel, about 4 truck parking spaces, a C-store and propane; a small-scale rather than full-service stop.

name: J & J Truck Wash and Repair
description: Truck and trailer wash (including trailer wash-outs) and repair shop serving the Buffalo I-90 area near Exit 49, open Mon-Fri and Saturday mornings.

name: McCarthy Tire Service - Buffalo
description: Commercial/fleet tire dealer under 1.5 miles from I-90 servicing trucks, buses, trailers and OTR/construction tires, with 24/7 commercial roadside assistance.

name: Mobile Tire Depot - Buffalo
description: 24/7 mobile truck tire service and roadside assistance for Buffalo and Western NY, including blowouts on I-90; dispatches a service van to the breakdown location.

name: Bach's Towing & Recovery
description: 24-hour heavy-duty towing, semi/commercial truck recovery and cargo recovery serving I-90, I-190 and Greater Buffalo/Western NY with WreckMaster-certified operators.

name: Rusiniak's Service Inc.
description: Family-owned truck/auto service with 24-hour light-to-heavy-duty towing and recovery (up to 50-ton lowboy), commercial truck repair and a truck wash, near I-90 in Cheektowaga.

name: 160 Driving Academy - Buffalo
description: CDL Class A truck-driver training school serving the Buffalo / I-90 metro area with classroom and behind-the-wheel instruction and flexible schedules.
